programs.title: Dear.m
programs.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programs.title: Krazy Rich Korean
programs.desc: 'Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world?' Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programs.title: A Graceful Liar
programs.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programs.title: The King Of Tears, Lee Bangwon
programs.desc: 'The King of Tears, Lee Bangwon' dealing with the defeat of Goryeo, the founding of Joseon.

programs.title: The Seasons W
programs.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'.

programs.title: Our Happy Days
programs.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.
